page.content: In the UK HM Treasury report for FY2023, the tax revenue composition is detailed as follows: Direct Taxes comprise Income Tax amounting to $150B, representing 40% with a rating of High; Indirect Taxes include Value Added Tax at $120B, 32% with a Medium rating, followed by Excise Duty, Alcohol Tax at $10B (3%, Medium), and Tobacco Tax at $5B (1%, Low). Property Taxes consist of Council Tax totaling $30B (8%, Medium) and Business Rates at $15B (4%, Medium). Other Taxes include Capital Gains Tax at $25B (7%, Medium) and Inheritance Tax at $10B (2%, Low), culminating in Total Revenue of $375B (100%, N/A) and a Growth Rate of 3.5%, with the Previous Year at $362B and a forecast of $400B.

page.content: The report notes the inclusion of all taxation, sourced from HM Treasury, with a review date of March 2024 and prepared by the Finance Department.

page.content: In the Trade Balance Overview, exports from Germany amount to $120M, imports $100M, yielding a Net Balance of $20M and Tariffs Collected of $15M, with Trade Volumes across quarters totaling $80M; France follows with exports at $110M, imports at $90M, a Net Balance of $20M, Tariffs Collected of $12M, and Total FY2023 at $75M. Italy's exports of $95M and imports of $85M provide a Net Balance of $10M, Tariffs Collected at $8M, and Total FY2023 at $40M. Spain records exports of $80M, imports of $70M, a Net Balance of $10M, Tariffs Collected of $6M, and Total FY2023 at $25M. The Netherlands shows exports of $150M and imports of $130M, resulting in a Net Balance of $20M, Tariffs Collected of $18M, and Total FY2023 at $90M.
